title: make test failed in mac
body:
hi
```
~/workspace/yosys>make test
$BREW_PREFIX is [/usr/local/opt]
[Makefile.conf] CONFIG := clang
[  0%] Building kernel/version_62739f7b.o
[  1%] Building kernel/register.o
[  1%] Building frontends/rtlil/rtlil_parser.tab.cc
frontends/rtlil/rtlil_parser.y:48.9-18: syntax error, unexpected identifier, expecting string
make: *** [frontends/rtlil/rtlil_parser.tab.cc] Error 1
```

~/workspace/yosys>make test
$BREW_PREFIX is [/usr/local/opt]
